arguments.script:
import json
import unreal
mesh_actor = unreal.EditorLevelLibrary.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, unreal.Vector(0.0, 0.0, 100.0), unreal.Rotator(0.0, 0.0, 0.0))
mesh_actor.set_actor_label('UEBridgeMCP_RuntimeRound1_20260423_211254')
mesh = unreal.load_asset('/Engine/BasicShapes/Cube.Cube')
mesh_comp = mesh_actor.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent)
if mesh_comp and mesh:
    mesh_comp.set_static_mesh(mesh)
    mesh_comp.set_collision_profile_name('BlockAll')
    mesh_comp.set_editor_property('mobility', unreal.ComponentMobility.MOVABLE)
    mesh_comp.set_world_scale3d(unreal.Vector(1.0, 1.0, 1.0))
cls = unreal.load_object(None, '/Game/UEBridgeMCPValidation/GameplayRuntimeRound1/BP_GameplayRuntime_20260423_211254.BP_GameplayRuntime_20260423_211254_C')
gas_actor = unreal.EditorLevelLibrary.spawn_actor_from_class(cls, unreal.Vector(220.0, 0.0, 100.0), unreal.Rotator(0.0, 0.0, 0.0))
gas_actor.set_actor_label('UEBridgeMCP_RuntimeGAS_20260423_211254')
print(json.dumps({
    'mesh_actor_label': mesh_actor.get_actor_label(),
    'mesh_actor_name': mesh_actor.get_name(),
    'gas_actor_label': gas_actor.get_actor_label(),
    'gas_actor_name': gas_actor.get_name(),
    'gas_components': [c.get_name() for c in gas_actor.get_components_by_class(unreal.ActorComponent)],
}))
